history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The safe path is to go downward along column B, so I should first turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor cell, and moving down along column B is the correct route toward the opening on row 08 that leads to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor. Continuing downward along column B is the safe path toward row 08, where I can move right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is a safe floor cell. Continuing downward remains the correct safe route to reach the open bottom row and then head right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe floor, so I should continue moving down toward the bottom open corridor before turning right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 07 column B is a safe floor cell, not lava. Moving there is the correct next step so I can then continue to the open path on row 08 toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 08 column B is safe floor. Moving forward will place me on the open bottom corridor that leads right toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 09 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To follow the open corridor toward the goal at row 08 column H, I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 08 column C is safe floor, and continuing along this corridor moves me toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 08 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column D is safe floor, and moving forward continues directly toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column E is safe floor, and moving forward keeps me on the clear path to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column E facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column F is safe floor, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column G is safe floor, and moving forward keeps me on the direct path to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column G facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column H is the goal, so moving forward will reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
